title: sorghum miliaceum
intro: Sorghum miliaceum, also known as broomcorn sorghum, is a type of grain sorghum that is widely cultivated for its edible seeds, straw, and as a broom-making material. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sorghum miliaceum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Sorghum miliaceum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
